name: Date and Apple Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Blend butter and sugar in a bowl until creamy.
3. Beat in the egg.
4. Stir in apples, dates, and nuts.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and baking soda.
6. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the apple mixture until just combined.
7. Spread the batter evenly in a greased 9" x 9" (225mm x 225mm) pan.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown and set.
